verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I could be a drift on life’s ocean And I could be in darkness of sin Well I could be in search of life’s meaning And I may be lost, but thank God that I am saved.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And now I am free from all sin and shame, I’m walking in the light of the Word of God, No longer in darkness, and no more will I stray I’m a prisoner, to the one that's in my soul.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I thank God that I am a prisoner, Yes, I’m so glad that Jesus took me in, Let me never shame my calling, And when time is o'er let eternity come in
